text: Build Content Generation (Thoughts -> Tweets/Images) using Gemini CLI

status.comment: Completed content generation pipeline. Successfully generates tweets and Instagram captions from extracted thoughts using Gemini CLI. Fixed image generation API endpoint (now uses correct generateContent method). Handles quota errors gracefully. Created review.ts script for content review. Added npm scripts (ingest, generate, review) and comprehensive README documentation. Generated 4 sample content pieces. Image generation ready but quota-limited (needs paid tier). Next: implement publishing automation.
